'''Bandor''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. Located along the northern mid-latitudes shores of the [[Great Sea of Bandomeer]], it was the planet's only city. Bandor housed the meagre government facilities and the [[Governor/Legends|governor's]] official residence, various native [[Meerian/Legends|Meerians]]' domiciles and extensive [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations. Numerous mines and drilling projects dotted the city. Meerians worked in various trades and support services, as well as in the mines around Bandor.

In addition to the native Meerian population, Bandor was also home to one of the most recognized [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] expatriate populations in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
